parameters.content:
## OR9 opp-contact attribution -> fact_opportunity_contact

STANDALONE (isolated from the big SF ingestion for memory). Chain:
Schedule -> Currency Rates -> Opp Contacts (Opportunity grain + nested
OpportunityContactRoles subquery, open-or-won, created 2026) -> Build (EUR) -> Upsert.

Feeds v_outreach_attributed_opps (joined to Outreach prospect emails).
'Created Opps' = created-and-(open or won); closed-lost excluded.

parameters.query: SELECT IsoCode, ConversionRate, IsCorporate FROM CurrencyType

SELECT Id, IsWon, IsClosed, StageName, Amount, CurrencyIsoCode, CreatedDate, (SELECT Contact.Email FROM OpportunityContactRoles) FROM Opportunity WHERE CreatedDate >= 2026-01-01T00:00:00Z AND (IsClosed = false OR IsWon = true)

INSERT INTO fact_opportunity_contact
  (opp_id, contact_email, created_date, is_won, is_closed, stage_name, amount_eur, loaded_at)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4::boolean, $5::boolean, $6, $7, now())
ON CONFLICT ON CONSTRAINT pk_opp_contact DO UPDATE SET
  created_date = EXCLUDED.created_date,
  is_won = EXCLUDED.is_won,
  is_closed = EXCLUDED.is_closed,
  stage_name = EXCLUDED.stage_name,
  amount_eur = EXCLUDED.amount_eur,
  loaded_at = now();
